name: Suite 11 — Arabic Foundations (Arabic mirror of suite-1)
description: Arabic-language mirror of suite-1: same 12 canonical shapes (SELECT / FILTER / ORDER / TOP-N / basic COUNT) phrased in Modern Standard Arabic. Gives an Arabic baseline score so the multi-language enhancement campaign has a measurable target. ExpectedSql is identical to the English mirror — the cross-lingual path is expected to converge on the same canonical SQL.

Scenarios.Question: اعرض أرقام التذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر ذات الأولوية الحرجة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر المفتوحة والحرجة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر ذات الأولوية الحرجة أو العالية
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر التي يحتوي عنوانها على كلمة login
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE Title LIKE '%login%' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر بدون فئة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CategoryId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر مرتبة حسب تاريخ الإنشاء من الأحدث
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: آخر عشر تذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
